arts.ttl: Report: Trent Alexander-Arnold could stay at Liverpool after Real Madrid twist
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold has been linked with a move to Real Madrid for a long time. The Reds defender has entered the final few months of his contract at Anfield and his long term future at the Premier League club remains uncertain. arts.ttl: Real Madrid have 'lost their head' over referee attack
arts.sum: La Liga president Javier Tebas says Real Madrid have "lost their head" by attacking the league's referees.

arts.ttl: Sergio Ramos joins Monterrey and chooses bizarre new shirt number to celebrate his Real Madrid career
arts.sum: Ramos made 87 appearances for Sevilla in total. He also played 58 times for Paris Saint-Germain during a two-year stint in France. But he is best known for his 16 seasons with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Arsenal linked with WORLD RECORD transfer as ‘absolute priority’ revealed
arts.sum: Real Madrid have already made plans for the summer, with Arsenal centre-back Saliba their “absolute priority”, according to RMC . Real Madrid have already plotted their perfect summer transfer window, with William Saliba firmly in the viewfinder of the Bernabeu side.

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid have decided they want to sign Arsenal star in a record-breaking transfer deal
Real Madrid's five best January transfers of all time
arts.sum: Marcelo made a total of 546 appearances for Los Blancos and he helped the club win 25 trophies, including the Champions League on five occasions, before leaving to join Olympiacos in 2022. Diarra helped Portsmouth win the FA Cup after just four months at the club and he established himself as a key player before leaving for Real Madrid.
